Precondition: User should be on login page
Test Steps:
1. Enter username
2. Enter password
3. Click Login button
Expected Results: User should be logged in successfully and redirected to dashboard

Description: Test error handling for invalid login
Precondition: User should be on login page
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid username
2. Enter invalid password
3. Click Login button

Precondition: User should be on login page and have account
Test Steps:
1. Click 'Forgot Password'
2. Enter email address
3. Check email for reset link
Expected Results: Email should contain password reset link that expires in 24 hours

Summary: Create test case with all fields
Precondition: User should be logged in and on test cases page
Test Steps:
1. Click 'New Test Case'
2. Fill all required fields
3. Add test steps
4. Click Save
Expected Results: Test case should be created with all fields saved correctly

Description: Test search feature for test cases
Precondition: User should have multiple test cases created
Test Steps:
1. Enter search term in search box
2. Press Enter
3. Review results
Expected Results: Search results should display only matching test cases

Precondition: Test case should exist and not be executed
Test Steps:
1. Open test case
2. Click 'Execute'
3. Set result to PASS
4. Add comments
5. Submit
Expected Results: Test execution should be recorded with timestamp and result
Test Data: result: PASS; comments: All steps passed
